item.title: Provincial Championship Results — April 2026
item.description: Athletes from across New Brunswick competed at the 2026 Provincial Championships held in Fredericton. Top finishers in all three weapons advance to national selection.

item.title: Three NB Athletes Selected for Canadian Championships
item.description: Fencing New Brunswick is proud to announce that three athletes have qualified to represent the province at the 2026 Canadian Fencing Championships in Montreal.

item.title: Registration Now Open: Junior Development Camp
item.description: Registration is now open for the 2026 Junior Development Camp, running June 6–7 in Moncton. Spots are limited — register early to secure your place.

item.title: New Club Joins the Federation: Dieppe Fencing Academy
item.description: Fencing New Brunswick warmly welcomes the Dieppe Fencing Academy as its newest member club, bringing fencing to the Dieppe–Moncton region for the first time.
